lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਮਨ ਮੰਦਰ ਮਹਿ ਮਨੂਆ ਧਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: eis man mandar meh manooaa dhaavai |
lines.english: In this temple of the mind, the mind wanders around.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਰਹੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਾਇਦਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: anadin sadaa rahai rang raataa kar kirapaa bhagat karaaeidaa |6|
lines.english: One who remains forever imbued with His Love, night and day - in His Mercy, the Lord inspires him to perform devotional worship service. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਪਲਰਿ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਮਹਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: sukh palar tiaag mahaa dukh paavai |
lines.english: Discarding joy like straw, it suffers in terrible pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭੇਟੇ ਠਉਰ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਆਪੇ ਖੇਲੁ ਕਰਾਇਦਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: bin satigur bhette tthaur na paavai aape khel karaaeidaa |7|
lines.english: Without meeting the True Guru, it finds no place of rest; He Himself has staged this play. ||7||
He Himself bestows Union through actions of excellence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਕੋ ਕਾਰ ਕਰੇ ਵੇਚਾਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: kiaa ko kaar kare vechaaraa aape bakhas milaaeidaa |8|
lines.english: What can the poor creatures do? Granting forgiveness, He unites them with Himself. ||8||
He Himself is infinite; He contemplates Himself.
Through the True Word of the Shabad, he makes them brave spiritual heroes.
The Perfect Lord Himself unites them with the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲੇ ਦੇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਸਚੇ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: aape mele de vaddiaaee sache siau chit laaeidaa |9|
lines.english: Uniting them with Himself, He bestows glorious greatness; He inspires them to focus their consciousness on the True Lord. ||9||
How rare are those who, as Gurmukh, realize this.
The True Lord is deep within the heart.
He wanders through foreign lands, but does not look within himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਰਸਨਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਦਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naam nidhaan vasiaa ghatt antar rasanaa naam dhiaaeidaa |10|
lines.english: The treasure of the Naam abides deep within their hearts; they meditate on the Naam with their tongues. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਕੀ ਫਾਸੀ ਕਬਹੂ ਨ ਤੂਟੈ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਭਰਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: jam kee faasee kabahoo na toottai doojai bhaae bharamaaeidaa |11|
lines.english: The noose of death around his neck will never be untied; in the love of duality, he wanders in reincarnation. ||11||
Attached to Maya, he is bound and gagged by the Messenger of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਕਮਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jab lag gur kaa sabad na kamaahee |
lines.english: as long as one does not live to the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪੁ ਤਪੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਹੋਰੁ ਕੋਈ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap sanjam hor koee naahee |
lines.english: There is no real chanting, meditation, penance or self-control,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਚੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad miliaa sach paaeaa sache sach samaaeidaa |12|
lines.english: Accepting the Word of the Guru's Shabad, one obtains Truth; through Truth, one merges in the True Lord. ||12||
Sexual desire and anger are very powerful in the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਸਭੁ ਦੁਖ ਕਾ ਪਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: bahu karam kamaaveh sabh dukh kaa pasaaraa |
lines.english: They lead to all sorts of actions, but these only add to all the pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਸੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: satigur seveh se sukh paaveh sachai sabad milaaeidaa |13|
lines.english: Those who serve the True Guru find peace; they are united with the True Shabad. ||13||
Air, water and fire make up the body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਤੇ ਜਾ ਤਿਸੈ ਪਛਾਣਹਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: jin keete jaa tisai pachhaaneh maaeaa mohu chukaaeidaa |14|
lines.english: When one realizes the One who created him, emotional attachment to Maya is dispelled. ||14||
Emotional attachment to Maya rules deep within all.
Some are engrossed in emotional attachment to Maya and pride.
They are self-conceited and egotistical.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਕਾਲੈ ਕੀ ਖਬਰਿ ਨ ਪਾਈ ਅੰਤਿ ਗਇਆ ਪਛੁਤਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: jamakaalai kee khabar na paaee ant geaa pachhutaaeidaa |15|
lines.english: They never think about the Messenger of Death; in the end, they leave, regretting and repenting. ||15||
The Gurmukh, who is blessed with the Shabad, realizes Him.
He alone knows the Way, who created it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸੁ ਕਹੈ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੬॥੨॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: naanak daas kahai benantee sach naam chit laaeidaa |16|2|16|
lines.english: Slave Nanak offers ths prayer; O Lord, let my consciousness be attached to the True Name. ||16||2||16||
Maaroo, Third Mehl:
From the very beginning of time, and throughout the ages, the Merciful Lord has been the Great Giver.
Through the Shabad, the Word of the Perfect Guru, He is realized.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁਨੋ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਸੇ ਤੁਝਹਿ ਸਮਾਵਹਿ ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tudhuno seveh se tujheh samaaveh too aape mel milaaeidaa |1|
lines.english: Those who serve You are immersed in You. You unite them in Union with Yourself. ||1||
All beings and creatures seek Your Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਵੈ ਚਲਾਵਹਿ ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jiau tudh bhaavai tivai chalaaveh too aape maarag paaeidaa |2|
lines.english: As is pleases Your Will, You guide us along; You Yourself place us on the Path. ||2||
You are inaccessible and unfathomable; Your limits cannot be found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਸਾਰ ਕਰੇ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਰਿਜਕੁ ਪਹੁਚਾਇਦਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa saar kare sukhadaataa aape rijak pahuchaaeidaa |3|
lines.english: The Giver of peace takes care of all; He Himself sustains them. ||3||
The True Lord is, and shall always be.
He Himself creates - there is no other at all.
You are inaccessible, unfathomable, invisible and infinite;
no one knows Your extent.
Your Almighty Command prevails throughout

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣਾ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣਹਿ ਆਪੇ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਆਪਿ ਬੁਝਾਇਦਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: aapanaa aap pachhaaneh aape guramatee aap bujhaaeidaa |4|
lines.english: You Yourself realize Yourself. Through the Guru's Teachings, You reveal Yourself. ||4||
